Transcrição Completa: 15 - Day 15 - Steps to Result

 

[00:00] "Steps to result. This is pretty cool. I use it for my social services package."

 

[00:05] "You're going to hear me talk a lot about systems. Your people in real time in this entire sales process and system."

 

[00:12] "It's going to be a lot of questions. You know what a majority of the questions are going to be about."

 

[00:17] "It's either going to be why are you contacting me? What do you want? And then once you transition from that to well, when can we talk?"

 

[00:24] "What do you want to talk about? Why are we talking about it? To then, well, how does this work?"

 

[00:30] "Like what are the systems? What's your like steps to how you're going to be able to do this stuff?"

 

[00:35] "All of the visual systems then come in handy because step by step, one by one, baby."

 

[00:41] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Steps to Result - Internal and External"

 

NÚMEROS: 6 steps (1 through 6)

 

VISUAL: Documento estruturado com 6 etapas numeradas, marcação com pontos vermelhos e verdes no canto superior, indicadores de uso interno e externo, layout profissional em formato de processo

 

[00:44] "In this case, one through six. Uh uh uh uh. Check it out. Set expectations."

 

[00:49] "You see this little red and green dot right here. Pretty simple. If you look at the top, right underneath steps to result where it says internal and external."

 

[00:58] "I also literally mark the piece of paper because you'll notice I'm very multi-purpose driven, meaning I don't just do things for one reason because that's an efficiency in itself."

 

[01:09] "I do things for multiple reasons because you have to have a multi-purpose action."

 

[01:14] "So, you can use this for your in-house staff. You can use it for your external clients. You can use it for your outsourcing partners."

 

[01:22] "This shows a process for the six steps that you follow."

 

[01:26] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Steps to Result Process"

 

NÚMEROS: 6 etapas sequenciais

 

VISUAL: Processo visual detalhado mostrando ciclo completo: Set Expectations → Gather the Assets → Change or Create Image Quotes, Content → Strategy Session → Action → Reporting and Real-Time Changes

 

[01:27] "This is an example of a visualized cycle that I'm walking people through."

 

[01:32] "Set expectations, gather the assets, change or create image quotes, content, strategy session, action, reporting, and real-time changes."

 

[01:43] "Each of these with an explanation in its own."

 

[01:46] "You have the ability to use things like this, rebrand it for you."

 

[01:50] "Once again, this is day 15. You have to hit 100."

 

[01:54] "This is a creative follow-up asset. You can send it to somebody specifically saying, 'Hey, thought of you when we just created this.'"

 

[02:02] "Wanted to make sure that you had a copy so you could see the exact steps we're going to take to get you the results that you're looking for within whatever package you put inside of this."

 

[02:13] "What if you had a social services package, you had a big dog heavy hitter package, you got a Facebook ads package, maybe you're a videographer, a copywriter, whatever your specific package is."

 

[02:26] "If you have a product for it, you can also have a system for it, which you should."

 

[02:31] "If you also visualize, which you can use this as a template, go hit up your graphic designer on Upwork, Fiverr, Freelancer, whatever you're going to use."

 

[02:41] "Or hit up your graphic designer in real time because your steps to result are going to be your steps to getting some cash."

 

[02:48] "Go hit up your 100."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Dia 15 de 100 (meta de conteúdo/sistema)

6 etapas no processo "Steps to Result"

Sistema multi-propósito (3 usos: staff interno, clientes externos, parceiros outsourcing)

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Sistema "Steps to Result": Framework visual de 6 etapas para delivery de serviços

Processo completo: Set Expectations → Gather Assets → Create Content → Strategy Session → Action → Reporting & Real-Time Changes

Multi-purpose approach: Um documento serve para staff, clientes e parceiros

Creative follow-up: Usar o sistema como ativo de follow-up em vendas

Aplicação universal: Adaptável para social services, Facebook ads, videografia, copywriting

 

ESTRUTURA:

Marcação visual com pontos vermelhos e verdes para diferentes usos

Indicadores "Internal and External" no topo

Cada etapa com explicação própria

Template replicável e rebrandável

Visualização de ciclo completo

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Plataformas mencionadas para designers: Upwork, Fiverr, Freelancer

Conceito: "steps to result = steps to getting cash"

Pacotes variados: social services, big dog heavy hitter, Facebook ads

 

DURAÇÃO: ~2:50 minutos FORMATO: Apresentação educacional com demonstração de sistema visual de processos
